conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid prepared according to <title xlink:type="simple" render="italic">Describing Archives: A Content Standard (DACS)</title>.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday December 7, 2018 at 00:24
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.

did.abstract: Collection consists of mounted black and white and color reproductions of paintings by artists from various countries. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code) or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Various Countries Painting Photograph Collection, Arts Library, Yale University

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of mounted black and white and color reproductions of paintings by artists from various countries. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The photographs are arranged alphabetically by country or region. Further arranged alphabetically by artist name. The countries include Canada, the Caribbean, Czechoslovakia, Denmark, Finland, Lithuania, Luxembourg, and New Zealand.

p.emph: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings. (40 photographs)

unittitle.emph: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings

p.emph: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings. [24 photographs]

p.emph: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings. [74 photographs]
